title: College graduates face competitive market as artificial intelligence spending rises
summary: A new report shows that nearly half of hiring managers would rather invest in artificial intelligence tools than train the latest class of college graduates.

title: Tropical Storm Bertha strikes Gulf Coast near the Texas-Louisiana line in second landfall
summary: Tropical Storm Bertha made a second landfall Thursday near the Texas-Louisiana state line after grazing southern Louisiana in a crawl that triggered heavy surf and some flooding along the Gulf Coast.

title: Sumter County detective arrested after alleged misuse of law enforcement databases
summary: A Sumter County sheriff’s detective has been fired and arrested for allegedly improperly accessing confidential law enforcement databases to monitor a person connected to her husband.

title: Tampa City Council makes history with rare 'no' vote on Rays stadium land use transmittal
summary: Tampa City Council voted 4-3 Thursday to block a land use amendment tied to a proposed Tampa Bay Rays development.

title: Homicide rates in the US are nearing a historic low
summary: The homicide rate was 18% lower in the first half of 2026 compared to the first half of 2025 across 30 major U.S. cities, according to a report out Thursday from the Council on Criminal Justice.

title: Special prosecutor drops all felony criminal charges against Louisiana Attorney General Murrill
summary: Felony charges against Louisiana Attorney General Liz Murrill have been dismissed — just weeks after her indictment. Here's what led to the case being thrown out.
